name: Roasted Pesto Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb red potatoes -- cut into 1 inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, toss together the pesto and the potatoes.
3. Spread the potatoes out on a baking sheet.
4. Bake for 45 minutes or until crispy and golden.
5. Serve hot.
